subcodes.first_line: O ye believers of God and friends of Abdul-Baha! If ye knew how the heart of Abdul-Baha is soaring
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual transformation, @unity in diversity, @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
